name: Calendar
description: Days until your next calendar event. The user pastes an iCal URL (Google Calendar / iCloud / Outlook all expose one) into the /admin settings; the server fetches it and parses the VCALENDAR with a tiny built-in iCal parser to surface the next upcoming VEVENT. 1x1 shows days_until + the event title as a sub; 2x2 adds a `next_at` line so the wall-clock date is visible.
